_comment: EXAMPLE ONLY (committed for reference). The real agent-pack/workmf-index.json is local + gitignored, generated by the WorkMF crawl (tools/node-t3d-metadata, mode WorkMF). It indexes YOUR UE project's own Material Functions so the viewer, the T3D exporter, and the authoring agent know their pin signatures by UE asset path. Official/engine MFs are NOT indexed.
